steps.title: Use the hybrid examples
steps.content: The blank describes forms that borrow from fables and realist narratives and straddle the line between prose and poetry. The needed word should mean lacking a fixed shape or clear category.

steps.title: Reject fixed or spatial meanings
steps.content: A means impartial, B means conventional, and D means scattered. Those meanings do not fit literary forms that blur boundaries and resist neat classification. The answer is C.
